---
title: "Research"
description: "Exploratory data analysis, experiments, and findings from our ongoing work."
listing:
  contents:
    - signal_analysis/fourier_transform.qmd
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

Research articles are **living documents** — they evolve as we learn more.
Each one has a status badge so you know how mature the work is.

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| 🟡 Draft | Early exploration, results may change |
| 🔵 Review | Ready for team review |
| 🟢 Published | Stable and peer-reviewed internally |
